paper_focus.title: Effect of Al Content on Inclusions in Fe-15Mn-xAl-C Low-Density Steel
paper_focus.research_objective: To elucidate how Al content affects solidification route and inclusion formation mechanisms (type, number, size, precipitation sequence, and heterogeneous nucleation) in Fe-15Mn-xAl-C low-density steel.
material_systems: Inclusion phases: Al2O3, AlN, MnS, TiN
Composite inclusions: Al2O3-MnS, AlN-MnS, TiN-MnS, Al2O3-AlN-MnS
main_process_variables: Holding time after deoxidizer addition: 60 min for Al addition after ferromanganese
Cooling: furnace cooling to room temperature
Sample preparation: electrolytic extraction (nonaqueous) and metallographic polishing
expected_information_axis: microstructure (inclusion type, number percentage, size distribution, morphology)
solidification route (liquidus/solidus temperatures, FCC/BCC phase regions)
mechanism (precipitation sequence, effect of Al on N solubility, heterogeneous nucleation via 2D mismatch)
figure_evidence (inclusion morphology maps, solidification path schematics, mismatch calculation tables)
